title: Funny Story
excerpt: This was shared to me via email, thought you all would get a kick out of it too. Hello Amy, I have a funny story to share with you. I have been trying to order one of your papers on…
body:
This was shared to me via email, thought you all would get a kick out of it too. Hello Amy, I have a funny story to share with you. I have been trying to order one of your papers on 2Peas for several months. Everytime it comes in, I put it in my cart, but when I get ready to hit the BUY button, the paper is already sold out. It's happened 3 different times at 2peas. Anyway, I decided to travel to a scrapbook store 2 towns over and try to get this specific paper. This is the conversation I had with the sweet lady trying to help me in the scrapbook store.

ME-- I'm looking for the Amy Tangerine LOVE paper. It's kraft with the word LOVE in white all over it.

Saleslady -- What? Who?

Me - Amy Tangerine, she has collections with American Crafts.

Saleslady -- Who? I have no idea what you're talking about.

Me -- WHAT? Amy Tangerine is the Julia Roberts of the scrapbooking world. How in the world could you not know who she is?

Saleslady -- Julia who?

Me -- You know, Pretty Woman?

Saleslady -- Are we still talking about scrapbooking here?

ME-- LOL -- shaking my head as I walk out of the store with no Amy Tan paper.

Anyway -- I wanted to share that conversation with you. I hope it makes you smile today.
